author: ria_meds
text: Took Crocin 650 for fever, ended up with bad stomach pain and rash. Anyone else? #Crocin

author: doc_aman
text: Patient on metformin with new-onset lactic acidosis — eGFR 28. Be careful with dose.

author: shreya.r
text: Dolo lene ke baad pet mein dard ho raha hai, normal hai kya?

author: ortho_ravi
text: Started atorvastatin last week, now severe myalgia in calves. Switching to rosuvastatin.

author: tn_health_news
text: TN govt issues alert on Coldrif syrup batch — diethylene glycol contamination suspected.

author: rohit_p
text: Dad on Telma 40 + Ecosprin combo getting daily dizziness. Asked doc to halve the dose.

author: neha_d
text: Just took some painkillers and feeling much better, no side effects.

author: pharmacist_in
text: Reminder: paracetamol max 4g/day. Crocin Advance + Dolo + Calpol are all paracetamol — don't double-dose.
